title: Irkutsk、Irkutsk Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Irkutsk、Irkutsk Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Irkutsk是Irkutsk Oblast的一個城市，人口約620,000。The cultural capital of Eastern Siberia, a historic city near Lake Baikal with beautiful wooden architecture and a vibrant Decembrist heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
